content: EditorHello everyone, this is FlyOverAsia. As the Editor-in-Chief of ACC Aero Center, OrganicCabbage will be responsible for editing and organizing articles for ACC Aero Center. If you have any questions about any article on this site, you can contact me (FlyOverAsia) directly in Discord.

title: ACC Aero Center
content:
ACC Aero Center - ENThe ACC Aero Center - EN project was relaunched on September 1, 2025, and officially launched on December 1, 2025. ACC Aero Center - EN is the international website for ACC Aero Center. The website uses the Hexo framework and the Keep theme and is hosted on GitHub. ACC Aero Center - EN aims to provide downloads and tutorials for the Aerofly FS series of games.
ACC Aero Club - InternationalThe Discord server ACC Aero Club - International was created on June 28, 2023. ACC Aero Club - International is the international community of the ACC Aero Club. ACC Aero Club - International is an Aerofly-focused aviation community, providing a platform for Aerofly communication.
ACC Aero CenterThe ACC Aero Center project was launched on May 1, 2023, and officially launched on July 1, 2023. The ACC Aero Center uses the Hexo framework, the Keep theme, and static web pages hosted on GitHub. The ACC Aero Center aims to provide downloads of Aerofly FS series game resources and various tutorials.
ACC Aero ClubThe original goal was to attract more players to join Aerofly. Currently, ACC Aero Club serves as a communication platform for flight simulations such as Microsoft Flight Simulator, X-plane 12, and Aerofly.
Project Manager[Orangedog]
Senior Painter[DaenerysX]
Special ThanksDiscord CommunityпЉЪACC Aero Club - International

title: B737-800 Camera Customization Addons
content:
[Introduction]Aerofly FS Global B737-800 parameter adjustment configuration file; customizable perspective (please refer to the guide below to modify it yourself).
[Download]dlc_aircraft_b737_800_ODp_v5.1.tme пЉИ7.20 KBпЉЙ
[Installation Steps]1.Please make sure you have completed downloading the file.
2.Open the file manager.
3.Find the downloaded file and move the file to the folder вАЬ/storage/emulated/0/Android/data/com.aerofly.aeroflyfsg1/files/вАЬ.
4.Wait for the move operation process to complete.
Having problems? Please visit the FAQs.
[Parameter Adjustment Guide]Guide Operation Reminder:
This guide is created based on the requirements of this plugin and practical experience. It does not represent an official tutorial provided by Aerofly FS and may contain inaccuracies.
Do not arbitrarily modify or delete code, as this may cause severe crashes.

Accessing Configuration Files:

The plugin file is named вАЬdlc_aircraft_b737_800_ODp_v5.1.tmeвАЭ. We recommend using the MT Manager for this task; other file managers may also work if they function properly.

Click вАЬdlc_aircraft_b737_800_ODp_v5.1.tmeвАЭ and select to open as a compressed archive. Navigate through the following folders: вАЬdlc_aircraft_b737_800вАЭ, вАШaircraftвАЩ, вАЬb737_800вАЭ, вАЬb737_800_settingвАЭ (path: вАЬdlc_aircraft_b737_800\aircraft\b737_800\b737_800_setting\вАЭ).

Click вАЬparameters.tmdвАЭ and select to open as text.

Refer to the following section for specific parameter adjustments.



Viewpoint Adjustment:
[Overall Structure]
Below is the viewpoint code structure within this plugin, with some unnecessary code removed.
Example (Click the double arrow below to expand all code):
// cameras    <[camera][CameraLeftWingViewAft][]    <[tmvector3d][R0][ -16.0 3.35 -0.3 ]>    <[tmvector3d][X0][ 0.0 0.0 0.0 ]>    <[tmvector3d][Direction][ 0.36 0.91 -0.1 ]>    <[bool][InCockpit][true]>    <[string8][Tags][cabin window wing flaps left rear]>>


[Viewpoint Position]
The camera position can be visualized as a spatial Cartesian coordinate system centered on the aircraft. The ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥ axes correspond to the X, Y, and Z axes of this coordinate system. The positive direction of the X-axis points forward, the positive direction of the Y-axis points left, the positive direction of the Z-axis points upward, the negative direction of the X-axis points backward, the negative direction of the Y-axis points right, and the negative direction of the Z-axis points downward.
The вАЬCameraPilotвАЭ view hides the pilot model but allows cockpit interaction; the вАШCameraCopilotвАЩ view displays the pilot model and allows cockpit interaction; the вАЬCameraJumpSeatвАЭ view displays the pilot model but disables cockpit interaction.
Values must be specified as real-type constants.
Each parameter (ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥) must be preceded and followed by at least one space.
<[tmvector3d][R0][ ќ± ќ≤ ќ≥ ]>

Example:
<[tmvector3d][R0][ 31.75 0.52 0.68 ]>


[Viewpoint Limits]
Modifying viewpoint limits is not recommended. Do not delete this line of code. This plugin defaults to removing viewpoint rotation limits, allowing unrestricted rotation angles.
Values must be represented as floating-point constants.
ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥ must each be preceded and followed by at least one space.
<[tmvector3d][X0][ ќ± ќ≤ ќ≥ ]>

Example:
<[tmvector3d][X0][ 0.0 0.0 0.0 ]>


[Camera Orientation]
The viewpoint orientation can be considered as a spatial Cartesian coordinate system with the viewpoint as its origin. ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥ correspond to the X, Y, and Z axes of this spatial Cartesian coordinate system. The positive direction of the X-axis is forward relative to the aircraft, the positive direction of the Y-axis is left relative to the aircraft, the positive direction of the Z-axis is upward relative to the aircraft, the negative direction of the X-axis is backward relative to the aircraft, the negative direction of the Y-axis is right relative to the aircraft, and the negative direction of the Z-axis is downward relative to the aircraft.
Values must be specified as real-type constants.
Each ќ±, ќ≤, and ќ≥ must be preceded and followed by at least one space.
<[tmvector3d][Direction][ ќ± ќ≤ ќ≥ ]>

Example:
<[tmvector3d][Direction][ 0.36 0.91 -0.1 ]>


[View Type]
The вАЬxxxвАЭ field accepts either вАЬtrueвАЭ or вАЬfalseвАЭ. вАШtrueвАЩ indicates an in-cockpit view, while вАЬfalseвАЭ indicates an out-of-cockpit view. Sound effects differ between in-cockpit and out-of-cockpit views.
<[bool][InCockpit][xxx]>

Example:
<[bool][InCockpit][true]>

Or:
<[bool][InCockpit][false]>


Use Deepl to translate the entire [Parameter Adjustment Guide]. If you encounter any inaccuracies, please contact FlyOverAsia.

title: B777300ER Enhance Addons
content:
This MOD is made by @orangedog.
IPACS Jet-Pack contributed greatly to this achievement. Thanks to him very much!
Follow the SOP and enjoy the perfect experience in your flight now!
[Download]dlc_aircraft_b777_300er_ODp_v5.1.tme
[Preview]


[V4.1]Now it feels much closer to reality!
вАї Fix error radio altitude when plane is on the ground.пЉИError from PMDGпЉЙ
[V4.0]вАї The aerodynamic model has been adjusted again. The low roll rate issue has been fixed, and the overall performance is now closer to PMDG. If youвАЩre lucky enough to own a PMDG 777, please let me know your thoughts!
вАї The wing and landing gear physics have been adjusted. The lift and bending of the wingtips are now almost identical to the real aircraft.
вАї The avionics parameters have been adjusted again according to PMDGвАЩs data. More accurate V-speed and takeoff thrust plans have been used.
вАї The payload has been adjusted, and correct flight balance and takeoff data have been used.
вАї Easy Simbrief Setup: IвАЩve made an aircraft file for you to use with Simbrief and create your flight plans.
OD 77w Enhance - Simbref Config
Just follow the simple steps to tweak the вАЬparameters.tmdвАЭ file in the вАЬCustom_fuel_payload_modвАЭ folder. For now, since the AF77W canвАЩt figure out takeoff speed on its own, use the вАЬ15-degree flap V-speedвАЭ picture IвАЩve attached. I do not recommend modifying the fuel weight in any way until IPACS implements a usable fuel system!


[V3.0]What did OD modify?вАї The aerodynamic model modified again and again. Fix some errors when compare to real plane videos or PMDG777. Now it wouldnвАЩt pitch up some much on cruise. And joystick will be much heavier than before when landing. Someone told me the experience become much closer to XLPANE.
вАї Modified the elasticity of the wing, so that it has close to the real physical performance at all times.
вАї Some changes have been made to EGT. But it doesnвАЩt quite match the real situation. OD thought he needed someone who is very good at aeroengines to help him with all the modifications, maybe jet-pack would offer some more helpsпЉЯ
вАї Adjust the pilot view for a better control of PFD and outside.
вАї Now the auto spoiler will not be opened early, and the automatic brakes will not be activated early.
[V2.5]What did OD modify?
вАї Now a customizable mod is provided in вАЬCustom_fuel_payload_modвАЭ folder. Modify the payload and fuel Mass and Value in it. But you should adjust the parameters before flight start, or it will donвАЩt apply unless you restart a new flight to reload the data.
вАї The aerodynamic model modified again. It is now close to the performance mentioned by FCOM and PMDG777 in Prepar3D. Similar scenes can also be seen in the real 77w video.
вАї Adjust some parameters about engine delay time. It is almost close to the data released by Boeing except for EGT, OD did not find the most correct modification method at the moment.
вАї The landing gear has been tweaked for heavier, more realistic performance.
вАї Adjust the weight of 77w and the actual data in CDU.
вАї Modify the aircraftвАЩs FlyByWire to correct the application to be consistent with the above data.

Hope you have fun flying this more realistic 77w!
For specific modification details, please refer to the post posted by Orange Dog.
https://www.aerofly.com/communвА¶&postID=134125#post134125
Extract it into the вАЬaircraftsвАЭ folder to add the mod files. If you need to restore the official version, just delete all folders the mod provides or make a backup in advance!

Refer to the following section for specific parameter adjustment instructions.

[Overall Structure]

// cameras    <[camera][CameraLeftWingViewAft][]    <[tmvector3d][R0][ -16.0 3.35 -0.3 ]>    <[tmvector3d][X0][ 0.0 0.0 0.0 ]>    <[tmvector3d][Direction][ 0.36 0.91 -0.1 ]>    <[bool][InCockpit][true]>    <[string8][Tags][cabin window wing flaps left rear]>>


[Viewpoint Position]
The camera position can be visualized as a spatial Cartesian coordinate system centered on the aircraft. The ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥ axes correspond to the X, Y, and Z axes of this coordinate system. The positive direction of the X-axis points forward, the positive direction of the Y-axis points left, the positive direction of the Z-axis points upward, the negative direction of the X-axis points backward, the negative direction of the Y-axis points right, and the negative direction of the Z-axis points downward.
The вАЬCameraPilotвАЭ view hides the pilot model but allows cockpit interaction; the вАШCameraCopilotвАЩ view displays the pilot model and allows cockpit interaction; the вАЬCameraJumpSeatвАЭ view displays the pilot model but disables cockpit interaction.
Values must be specified as real-type constants.
Each parameter (ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥) must be preceded and followed by at least one space.
<[tmvector3d][R0][ ќ± ќ≤ ќ≥ ]>

Example:
<[tmvector3d][R0][ 31.75 0.52 0.68 ]>


[Viewpoint Limits]
Modifying viewpoint limits is not recommended. Do not delete this line of code. This plugin defaults to removing viewpoint rotation limits, allowing unrestricted rotation angles.

<[tmvector3d][X0][ ќ± ќ≤ ќ≥ ]>

Example:
<[tmvector3d][X0][ 0.0 0.0 0.0 ]>


[Camera Orientation]
The viewpoint orientation can be considered as a spatial Cartesian coordinate system with the viewpoint as its origin. ќ±, ќ≤, ќ≥ correspond to the X, Y, and Z axes of this spatial Cartesian coordinate system. The positive direction of the X-axis is forward relative to the aircraft, the positive direction of the Y-axis is left relative to the aircraft, the positive direction of the Z-axis is upward relative to the aircraft, the negative direction of the X-axis is backward relative to the aircraft, the negative direction of the Y-axis is right relative to the aircraft, and the negative direction of the Z-axis is downward relative to the aircraft.
Values must be specified as real-type constants.
Each ќ±, ќ≤, and ќ≥ must be preceded and followed by at least one space.
<[tmvector3d][Direction][ ќ± ќ≤ ќ≥ ]>

Example:
<[tmvector3d][Direction][ 0.36 0.91 -0.1 ]>


[View Type]
The вАЬxxxвАЭ field accepts either вАЬtrueвАЭ or вАЬfalseвАЭ. вАШtrueвАЩ indicates an in-cockpit view, while вАЬfalseвАЭ indicates an out-of-cockpit view. Sound effects differ between in-cockpit and out-of-cockpit views.

title: B777300ER Enhance Addons
content:
This MOD is made by @orangedog.
IPACS Jet-Pack contributed greatly to this achievement. Thanks to him very much!
Follow the SOP and enjoy the perfect experience in your flight now!
[Download]OrangeDog_TEAM_b777_300er_v5.1.rar
[Preview]


[V4.1]Now it feels much closer to reality!
вАї Fix error radio altitude when plane is on the ground.пЉИError from PMDGпЉЙ
[V4.0]вАї The aerodynamic model has been adjusted again. The low roll rate issue has been fixed, and the overall performance is now closer to PMDG. If youвАЩre lucky enough to own a PMDG 777, please let me know your thoughts!
вАї The wing and landing gear physics have been adjusted. The lift and bending of the wingtips are now almost identical to the real aircraft.
вАї The avionics parameters have been adjusted again according to PMDGвАЩs data. More accurate V-speed and takeoff thrust plans have been used.
вАї The payload has been adjusted, and correct flight balance and takeoff data have been used.
вАї Easy Simbrief Setup: IвАЩve made an aircraft file for you to use with Simbrief and create your flight plans.
OD 77w Enhance - Simbref Config
Just follow the simple steps to tweak the вАЬparameters.tmdвАЭ file in the вАЬCustom_fuel_payload_modвАЭ folder. For now, since the AF77W canвАЩt figure out takeoff speed on its own, use the вАЬ15-degree flap V-speedвАЭ picture IвАЩve attached. I do not recommend modifying the fuel weight in any way until IPACS implements a usable fuel system!


[V3.0]What did OD modify?вАї The aerodynamic model modified again and again. Fix some errors when compare to real plane videos or PMDG777. Now it wouldnвАЩt pitch up some much on cruise. And joystick will be much heavier than before when landing. Someone told me the experience become much closer to XLPANE.
вАї Modified the elasticity of the wing, so that it has close to the real physical performance at all times.
вАї Some changes have been made to EGT. But it doesnвАЩt quite match the real situation. OD thought he needed someone who is very good at aeroengines to help him with all the modifications, maybe jet-pack would offer some more helpsпЉЯ
вАї Adjust the pilot view for a better control of PFD and outside.
вАї Now the auto spoiler will not be opened early, and the automatic brakes will not be activated early.
[V2.5]What did OD modify?
вАї Now a customizable mod is provided in вАЬCustom_fuel_payload_modвАЭ folder. Modify the payload and fuel Mass and Value in it. But you should adjust the parameters before flight start, or it will donвАЩt apply unless you restart a new flight to reload the data.
вАї The aerodynamic model modified again. It is now close to the performance mentioned by FCOM and PMDG777 in Prepar3D. Similar scenes can also be seen in the real 77w video.
вАї Adjust some parameters about engine delay time. It is almost close to the data released by Boeing except for EGT, OD did not find the most correct modification method at the moment.
вАї The landing gear has been tweaked for heavier, more realistic performance.
вАї Adjust the weight of 77w and the actual data in CDU.
вАї Modify the aircraftвАЩs FlyByWire to correct the application to be consistent with the above data.

Hope you have fun flying this more realistic 77w!
For specific modification details, please refer to the post posted by Orange Dog.
https://www.aerofly.com/communвА¶&postID=134125#post134125
Extract it into the вАЬaircraftsвАЭ folder to add the mod files. If you need to restore the official version, just delete all folders the mod provides or make a backup in advance!

title: Basic FAQs
content:
вАЬQвАЭ represents the question, вАЬAвАЭ represents the answer.

гАРFAQsгАСQ: Can I install plugins from one generation of Aerofly FS on another generation?
A: We strongly discourage installing plugins from one generation of Aerofly FS on another. All resources on this site have been tested and adapted for each generation of Aerofly FS to the greatest extent possible. If the plugin you want doesnвАЩt work with your current generation of Aerofly FS, it indicates compatibility issues. Installing plugins across generations may cause game crashes, and you will be solely responsible for any consequences.
Q: Can I use game accelerators or virtual machines that use the Google Services Framework, such as Ourplay or Gspace?
A: We do not recommend using game accelerators or virtual machines that use the Google Services Framework, as this may result in user information leakage or device crashes.
Q: What iOS version is this?
A: All content on this site is not compatible with iOS or MAC operating systems.
Q: Why did I get an error when unzipping online?
A: The file must be downloaded locally before it can be read. Please do not use online decompression. The consequences are at your own risk.

title: (chrispriv) AeroScenery v1.1.3 MOD j for Photo Scenery Creation
content:
This is an updated MOD for @nickhod вАШs popular App for creating photo sceneries on Aerofly FS2/4, features many improvements comparing to the initial version (e.g. works together with my TreesDetection App, allows to create worldwide 30m elevation maps in a simple way for AFS, to download OSM data separately, new with simultaneous downloads up to 8 streams instead of 4, makes several satellite image sources to work again and much more, enhanced seach and much more). Now also usable as a moving map for Aerofly.



Highlights of updated version 1.1.3 MOD i & j:
вАїNow also usable as a moving map for Aerofly reading UDP data port with data streaming вАШonвАЩ in Aerofly FS2/4 Settings.вАїAdded вАЬmap fixedвАЭ, вАЬflight tracingвАЭ & вАЬhide working tilesвАЭ mode, detecting IP address functionality and interpolation for smother movement in moving map.вАїEnhanced Search Tile/Location function, which also allows you to search for places, regions etc. (performs geocoding for location search using OpenStreet Map Data).вАїAdded tooltips and hints making the use of AeroScenery easier for beginners (working scenery name can be set now under Settings for easy installation using вАЬInstall SceneryвАЭ for selected tiles after conversion).вАїSimpler installation of the MOD without prior installation of the update to version 1.1.3 is now possible, since the whole package is included.

Here is the complete change log history of the version 1.1.3 MOD j by @chrispriv
AeroScenery_v1_1_3_MOD_j.zip









Installation of MOD

You first need Geoconvert tool as part of Aerofly FS 2 SDK (not supported by IPACS anymore but still available for download here: Aerofly FS 2 Software Development Kit (SDK) вАУ Aerofly-Sim.de )

2.Install the initial Release 1.0.1 of AeroScenery from GitHub (GitHub - nickhod/aeroscenery > Microsoft Windows Installer AeroScenery.msi ). Make sure you have a correct and properly working initial Release 1.0.1 of AeroScenery, including working settings *)

Just overwrite the whole вАЬC:\Program Files (x86)\AeroSceneryвАЭ folder with the attached and unzipped MOD 1.1.3 folder (check the file specs of the executable file and the version number of the MOD in the upper right corner after the first launch of the modified AeroScenery App)

*) After the installation using the installer, you should have a new directory in your user directory вАЬ\Documents\AeroScenery" containing the setting.xml and the subfolders вАЬdatabaseвАЭ and вАЬworkingвАЭ. Finally, you have to set under Settings вАЬAFS2 SDK FolderвАЭ of AeroScenery App the path to the root folder of IPACS Aerofly FS2 SDK (aerofly_fs_2_geoconvert.exe should then be located by default in the subdirectory вАЬ\aerofly_fs_2_geconvert").

Note for using ArcGIS
To avoid missing tiles it is recommended to set the parameters for вАЬWaiting Between DownloadsвАЭ and вАЬrandomize +/-вАЬ to at least the following values (this also improves reliability using other sources):


If you still have issues, there are several workarounds:
a) Increase the values in Settings up to вАЬ30 / 10вАЭ
b) Redownload the tiles and then stitch the image tiles again (using the MOD, now only missing tiles would be downloaded)
c) The fastest and most reliable way to download missing tiles is to run the provided PowerShell PS1 script and stitch the Image tiles again

Tutorials
Path to the original App on GitHub: GitHub - nickhod/aeroscenery: A tool to create orthophoto scenery for Aerofly FS2
Initial AeroScenery Guide from @crispy136: AeroScenery Guide for Version 1.1.0 and above

title: Aerofly FS 2022 Q&A
content:
вАЬQвАЭ represents the question, вАЬAвАЭ represents the answer.

гАРAerofly FS 2022 Q&AгАСQ: Why canвАЩt I find Aerofly FS 2022 in the Google Play Store?
A: Aerofly FS 2022 has been removed from the store and is no longer available for purchase. Aerofly FS 1, Aerofly FS 2, Aerofly FS 2021, Aerofly FS 2022, and Aerofly FS 2022 have been replaced by Aerofly FS Global. The previous annual update system has been discontinued, and a subscription service is now available, eliminating the need to purchase a new game version every year. Users who have already purchased Aerofly FS 2022 can still find it in their purchase history and download it.
Q: Why does the error message вАЬSomething went wrong. Check that Google Play is enabled on your device and that youвАЩre using an up-to-date version before opening the app. If the problem persists, try reinstalling the app.вАЭ pop up when launching the game?
A: Google Play services are not installed. Please install the complete Google Play services before launching the game. 
Q: Why does the game display the message вАЬAerofly FS 2022 is not authorized. Authorization could not be verified. Check for an available network connection.вАЭ when I try to launch the game?
A: Please ensure you are properly connected to the internet and that you have purchased the game. If you havenвАЩt purchased it, you cannot play. If you have confirmed you are properly connected to the internet and have purchased the game, please open Google Play, search for вАЬAerofly FS 2022,вАЭ and click вАЬStart GameвАЭ within Google Play to obtain/refresh Google authorization verification.
